title: When a master password is defined, mRemoteNG may be lock after a while or when minimized
author: Nycolas
body_snippet:

First of all, thanks for your great software ! 

(this feature is present in KeePass, a password manager)

1) Add an option under "configuration" (root of the connexion tree), near "Password protect". Only if password protect is set to "yes", then this o...

comments.author: fantomrik
comments.snippet: I support it, this function would be very useful!

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Patch package ready for review: 
- PR: PR #3122 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` 
- Scope: root-level autolock option (`AutoLockOnMinimize`) + lock on minimize/5-minute idle + unlock prompt on restore + serializer/deserializer coverage.

---

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
